title: Audience Copilot
description: Recommendation feed with segment, action and expected impact.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(segment := segment_col, action := action_col, actionType := action_type, modification := change_note, impact := impact_text, impactTrend := impact_trend) ORDER BY priority_rank)

title: Predictive Forecast
description: Historical series with forecast extension and optional confidence bands.

title: Technical Health
description: Grid of named metrics with value and status.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := metric_name, value := metric_value, status := metric_status) ORDER BY metric_index)

title: Trend Spotter
description: Weighted keyword cloud with trend direction.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(text := keyword_text, weight := weight_value, trend := trend_direction) ORDER BY weight_value DESC)

title: Sparkline Stat
description: KPI with a small sparkline showing recent movement.
data_requirements: value: Current value displayed above the sparkline.
dataPoints: Ordered list of recent numeric values.

sql_aliases.description: Current value displayed above the sparkline.
Ordered list of recent numeric values.
Optional hex color for the sparkline.

title: Metric Trend
description: Single KPI card with optional unit and period-over-period delta.
data_requirements: value: Primary KPI value shown in large type.

sql_aliases.description: Primary KPI value shown in large type.
Optional unit such as %, x, min or pts.
Formatted delta value such as +4.2% or -3 pts.
Short comparison label like vs yesterday.

title: Pulse Circle
description: Breathing status circle for a single value.

title: Natural Micro
description: KPI with unit and a linear slider fill.

title: Chrono Dial
description: Minimal slider-pointer dial for freshness or recency scores.

title: Liquid Gauge
description: Circular liquid fill used for saturation or utilization metrics.

title: Scanning Orbit
description: Radar-like compact status widget with value and unit.

title: Uptime Strip
description: Compact uptime card with bar states and current uptime value.
data_requirements: value: Primary uptime or availability value.
uptimeBars: Ordered list of status tokens: good, warn, down.

sql_aliases.description: Ordered list of status tokens: good, warn, down.

title: Color Slider
description: Tick-based slider used for rate or progress style metrics.

title: Gauge Panel
description: Circular gauge showing one percentage-like score.
data_requirements: value: Display value or label at the center.

sql_aliases.description: Display value or label at the center.

title: Red Gradient
description: Single horizontal gauge used for risk-heavy progress.

title: Emotion Wave
description: Sentiment-style widget driven by one percentage-like score.

title: Signal Scale
description: Segmented signal gauge for directional quality or intensity.
data_requirements: value: Primary textual value displayed beside the scale.

sql_aliases.description: Primary textual value displayed beside the scale.
Optional longer note shown on vertical layout.
True when higher scores are better.

title: Weather Micro
description: Minimal KPI display with a compact value and unit.
data_requirements: value: Primary value shown in the center.

sql_aliases.description: Primary value shown in the center.
Unit or suffix displayed next to value.

title: Neural Nexus
description: Circular tick dial for a single score.

title: Intensity Heat
description: Single value card for fatigue, pressure or saturation style metrics.

title: Productivity Micro
description: Abstract vertical-dot spark widget fed by a short numeric sequence.
data_requirements: dataPoints: Ordered array of small numeric bars.

sql_aliases.description: Ordered array of small numeric bars.

title: Budget Sensitivity
description: Elasticity curve over increasing budget or capacity steps.
data_requirements: curvePoints: Ordered [x, y] points describing the curve.

sql_aliases.description: Ordered [x, y] points describing the curve.

title: Waterfall
description: Bridge from gross to net through positive and negative steps.
data_requirements: steps: Ordered list of bridge steps.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := step_name, value := step_value, isTotal := is_total) ORDER BY step_index)

title: Campaign List
description: Compact ranked list with label, value and directional trend.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := label_col, value := metric_col, trend := trend_sign) ORDER BY metric_sort DESC)

title: Leads List
description: Compact live-feed of rows such as leads, incidents or routes.
data_requirements: leads: List of rows containing name, value, status and time.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := name_col, value := value_col, status := status_col, time := time_label) ORDER BY sort_index)
sql_aliases.description: List of rows containing name, value, status and time.

title: Sankey Flow
description: Node-link flow diagram using nodes and links.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(source := source_name, target := target_name, value := flow_value) ORDER BY link_order)

title: Stream Graph
description: Stacked stream series encoded as [period, value, category].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([period_label, metric_value, category_name] ORDER BY period_index, category_name)

title: Waffle Chart
description: 10x10 occupancy chart driven by a 0-100 value.

title: Semi-Circle Donut
description: Half-donut chart of platform shares.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := label_col, value := metric_value, color := color_hex) ORDER BY metric_value DESC)

title: Activity Heatmap
description: Two-dimensional heatmap of bucketed activity.
data_requirements: heatmapData: Matrix rows encoded as [x_index, y_index, value].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([bucket_x, bucket_y, metric_value] ORDER BY bucket_y, bucket_x)
sql_aliases.description: Matrix rows encoded as [x_index, y_index, value].

title: Scatter Plot
description: Scatter of two numeric variables with optional period labels.

title: Live Traffic Chart
description: Hero line chart with current metrics, annotation and recent series.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(icon := icon_name, label := card_label, value := card_value, delta := card_delta, note := card_note) ORDER BY card_index)
sql_aliases.description: Optional summary cards derived from the same query.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: struct_pack(index := annotation_index, label := annotation_label, value := annotation_value)

title: Range Area Chart
description: Average series with min/max envelope.

title: Covariance Matrix
description: Square matrix comparing relationships between multiple features.
data_requirements: fields: Ordered list of matrix dimensions.
matrix: Square matrix values aligned with fields.

sql_aliases.description: Square matrix values aligned with fields.

title: Optimal Time Heatmap
description: Calendar-style matrix for best-performing time windows with summary cards.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(id := card_id, icon := icon_name, label := card_label, value := card_value, delta := card_delta, note := card_note, tone := card_tone) ORDER BY card_index)
list(struct_pack(label := label_col, value := value_col) ORDER BY value_sort DESC)

title: Benchmark Bars
description: Ranked benchmark bars with score, target and delta.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(label := benchmark_name, score := score_value, target := target_value, delta := delta_text) ORDER BY benchmark_order)

title: Lead Clustering
description: Cluster scatter using [engagement, probability, label].
data_requirements: clusteringData: Rows encoded as [engagement_score, probability, entity_name].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([engagement_score, conversion_probability, entity_name] ORDER BY engagement_score DESC)

title: Attention Heatmap
description: Heatmap matrix with x/y labels and side notes.
data_requirements: matrix: Matrix values aligned to xLabels/yLabels.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(label := note_label, value := note_value) ORDER BY note_index)
sql_aliases.description: Summary notes shown to the right.

title: Anomaly Stream
description: Scatter plot of anomaly candidates using x/y dispersion and entity label.
data_requirements: dispersionData: Scatter points as [x_value, y_value, label].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([x_metric, y_metric, entity_name] ORDER BY y_metric DESC)

title: Training Loss Panel
description: Dual-loss panel with auxiliary perplexity and headline stats.
data_requirements: steps: Ordered checkpoint or step labels.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(label := stat_label, value := stat_value, accent := accent_color, meta := stat_note) ORDER BY stat_index)

title: Incremental Lift
description: Three-bar comparison for organic, paid and incremental contribution.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(label := bucket_label, value := metric_value, color := color_hex, deltaLabel := annotation_text) ORDER BY bucket_index)

title: Shapley Attribution
description: Stacked periods derived from raw [channel, score, period] contributions.
data_requirements: rawData: Flat rows encoded as [channel, score, year_or_period].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([channel_name, contribution_score, period_key] ORDER BY period_key, sample_index)
sql_aliases.description: Flat rows encoded as [channel, score, year_or_period].

title: Interest Radar
description: Radar chart of multidimensional interests or attributes.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := axis_name, max := axis_max) ORDER BY axis_index)
list(struct_pack(name := series_name, value := axis_values, itemStyle := item_style, areaStyle := area_style) ORDER BY series_index)

title: Market Sentiment Radar
description: Radar chart summarising current posture or sentiment.
data_requirements: radarData: One or more radar series.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := axis_name, max := axis_max) ORDER BY axis_index)
list(struct_pack(name := series_name, value := axis_values, itemStyle := item_style, areaStyle := area_style, lineStyle := line_style) ORDER BY series_index)

title: Cohort Analysis
description: Retention cohorts with headline summary.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(week := cohort_label, size := cohort_size, data := retention_values) ORDER BY cohort_order)

title: Intent Sunburst
description: Hierarchical sunburst for nested audience or behavior intent.
data_requirements: sunburstData: Hierarchy tree with nested children arrays.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: Return a nested JSON-compatible tree using list(struct_pack(..., children := ...)).
sql_aliases.description: Hierarchy tree with nested children arrays.

title: Attribution
description: Donut plus supporting panels for source or channel allocation.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(channel := channel_name, monthly := secondary_value, yearly := primary_value, yearlyColor := primary_color, monthlyColor := secondary_color) ORDER BY primary_value DESC)
list(struct_pack(label := metric_label, value := metric_value, delta := delta_text, note := note_text, tone := tone_color) ORDER BY metric_index)

sql_aliases.description: Primary metric label, e.g. yearly or weekly.
Secondary metric label, e.g. monthly or daily.

title: Market Evolution
description: Force graph of nodes and weighted links.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := node_name, color := color_hex, value := node_value, synergy := tier_label) ORDER BY node_order)
list(struct_pack(source := source_name, target := target_name, value := edge_weight) ORDER BY edge_order)

title: Creative Quadrant
description: Scatter quadrant with configurable axes and zone labels.
data_requirements: creatives: Scatter rows as [x_value, y_value, label, type].

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list([x_metric, y_metric, entity_name, entity_type] ORDER BY score DESC)
sql_aliases.description: Scatter rows as [x_value, y_value, label, type].

title: Funnel
description: Hero funnel with summary headline and stage marker pills.
data_requirements: stageColumns: Three stage markers for the visual envelope.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(top := stage_label, metric := stage_value, bottom := stage_note) ORDER BY stage_index)
sql_aliases.description: Three stage markers for the visual envelope.

title: Mapbox / Globe
description: Map or globe view fed by a list of geographic points and optional projection config.
data_requirements: locations: List of map points with name and coordinates.

sql_aliases.expression_hint: list(struct_pack(name := label_col, address := address_col, longitude := lon_col, latitude := lat_col, intensity := score_col) ORDER BY score_col DESC)
sql_aliases.description: List of map points with name and coordinates.
Rotation speed when auto-rotate is enabled.
